notes: Practice's own site (schaumburgfamilydentistry.com) blocked direct WebFetch (403 on 3 attempts: homepage, contact-us, meet-the-doctors), but indexed search-result content plus third-party listings (Yelp, Healthgrades) corroborate exact address (1305 Wiley Rd, Suite 103, Schaumburg, IL) and phone (847-843-1505) match to this record. Site content names two dentists, Dr. Catherine Flores-Noto and Dr. Jeffrey Swager; no careers/hiring page found in indexed content.

owner_operator_stated: D&B/Cortera business records identify Jonathan Wong as the Member (owner) of JWW Dental, LLC, which does business as Renovo Endodontic Studio at this address; the Renovo site itself does not name individual doctors on the pages checked (it refers only to 'our team of specialists').

openings.title: See open positions (links out to Indeed listing; no specific titles shown on-page)

notes: Legal entity JWW Dental LLC operates publicly as Renovo Endodontic Studio, an endodontic SPECIALIST practice (not GP), and a multi-location group with offices in Schaumburg, Elgin, Downers Grove, and Rockford, IL. Schaumburg office address (808 E Woodfield Rd, Suite 300, Schaumburg, IL 60173) matches this record exactly on the practice's own site; phone match corroborated via third-party listing (Buzzfile/BBB), not directly confirmed on the fetched site pages. Careers page links out to Indeed for open positions; specific job titles not itemized on-page.

owner_operator_stated: Current site (scharringtondental.com) lists Dr. Joon Han and Dr. Sung Park as the practicing dentists at 1900 E Golf Rd, Suite 130, Schaumburg, IL 60173; Dr. Emily Chen is not listed anywhere on the current site, and the site's own former '/meet-dr-emily-chen/' bio page now returns a 'Page Deleted' error, indicating she is no longer associated with this address.
notes: Named record entity is 'Chen Emily DDS' at 1900 E Golf Rd, Schaumburg, phone (847) 860-6743. The only address-matching site found, Scharrington Dental, currently lists different practicing dentists (Han, Park) and different phone numbers ((847) 892-1882 new patients / (847) 891-9999 existing patients) than this record's phone. Searching the exact record phone number in quotes returned no matching current business. Treated as ownership_conflict/successor: Dr. Chen's affiliation with this address, if it existed, appears to have ended.

owner_operator_stated: Current site (coredentalstcharles.com) 'Meet Our Dental Team' page lists Dr. Christopher Doran and Dr. Claire Sheehan as the practicing dentists at 525 Tyler Rd, Suite K, St. Charles, IL 60174, current-patient phone (630) 584-8444 (exact match to this record). Dr. Timothy Sheehan, the named record entity, is not mentioned on the current team page.
notes: Record entity 'Timothy W. Sheehan, Ltd.' matches this exact address/phone in older directory listings (Yelp/Healthgrades still show legacy 'Timothy Sheehan DDS' branding), but the practice's current live website is branded 'CORE Dental' with a different roster (Dr. Christopher Doran, Dr. Claire Sheehan — likely a family successor given the shared surname, not Timothy Sheehan himself). A separate legacy domain, timothysheehandds.com, returned a connection error (appears dead/decommissioned). Treated as ownership_conflict/successor given the rebrand and roster change at the same address/phone.

owner_operator_stated: West Gate Family Dentistry's own contact page confirms this address (3381 W Main St, Suite 3, St. Charles, IL 60175) and phone ((630) 513-2121), listing Dr. Anum Siddiqui, DMD and Dr. Douglas Kay, DDS as the practicing dentists; no mention of 'Dental Club Hoffman Estates P.C.' A separate, unrelated business called 'Dental Club Partners - Poplar Crossing Dental' exists at a different address (2630 N Sutton Rd, Hoffman Estates, IL) and appears to be the source of the 'Dental Club' branding in the record's legal name, not this location.
notes: Address and phone corroborate to West Gate Family Dentistry (owned by Dr. Anum Siddiqui and Dr. Douglas Kay; one source notes a prior owner 'Dr. Disimoni sold Westgate Family Dental in 2022'), a completely different name/entity than the record's 'Dental Club Hoffman Estates P.C.' No evidence links the two names at this address; treated as ownership_conflict/successor.
